quota_dashboard.title: Quota Dashboard
quota_dashboard.subtitle: Export quota analytics — local sales, issuance, usage
quota_dashboard.kpi_sales_tip: Total kg sold locally by greenhouse firms this period
quota_dashboard.kpi_expected_tip: Government should grant ~10x the local sales as export quota
quota_dashboard.kpi_issued_tip: Actual quota kg granted by the government
quota_dashboard.kpi_not_given_tip: Expected quota minus issued — the shortfall from government
quota_dashboard.kpi_used_tip: Quota that firms have used for actual exports
quota_dashboard.kpi_unused_tip: Issued quota that has not been used yet
quota_dashboard.kpi_expired_tip: Quota that expired before it could be used — lost opportunity
quota_dashboard.add_issuance_desc: Record a government quota grant with per-firm allocations
quota_dashboard.no_firms_selected: Select at least one firm with quota > 0

quota_usage.grid_empty: No usage records for this month

local_sell.error_load: Failed to load local sell plans

prices.title: Market Prices
prices.subtitle: Daily price panel by route
prices.note: Prices sourced from field reports. USD equivalents are approximate.

shipment_create.title: New Shipment
shipment_create.toast_success_draft: Draft created — assign destination, then promote to Loading
shipment_create.skip_prep: Skip prep — create directly at Loading
shipment_create.skip_prep_help: For urgent reshipments or legacy imports. Default: create as draft and run through prep tasks first.
shipment_create.draft_mode_alert: Will be created in Draft. The team picks destination, firms, driver, and starts documents prep — then you promote it to Loading from the Detail page.
shipment_create.skip_prep_alert: Will be created directly at Loading. The cargo code is auto-generated; the loading start time is set immediately. Use only for urgent reshipments and legacy imports.

kanban.subtitle: Current status of active shipments — Kanban view

transition.comment_placeholder: Reason or note for this transition...

sales_report.only_at_hasabat: Available when shipment reaches Hasabat status.

overdue.title: Overdue Reports

shipment_settings.title: Shipment Settings
shipment_settings.subtitle: Manage shipment lifecycle statuses, border points and option lists
shipment_settings.confirm_delete: Are you sure you want to delete this item?

sheet_rows.tooltip_user_picker: For duties shared by multiple people, assign by role instead.
sheet_rows.locked_tooltip_extra_users: Extra users retain access even when lock is enabled
sheet_rows.conflict_message: Someone else has modified this row. Refresh the page to see the latest data.
sheet_rows.info_plate_desc: To add a new typed field — create a task for a developer (see runbook). Rename, reorder, set permissions, visibility, style, or add a free-text custom row — do it here.
sheet_rows.add_custom_hint: Free-text row, no migration. For typed fields use the developer runbook.
sheet_rows.custom_slug_invalid: Use lowercase letters, digits, underscores only (max 53 chars).
sheet_rows.custom_slug_hint: Final field_key will be 'custom_<slug>'. Slug must be unique across all rows.
sheet_rows.custom_label_required: At least the English label is required
sheet_rows.custom_delete_confirm_body: The row will be hidden from the Sheet for everyone. Per-shipment values stay in the database and reappear if the row is restored. This is a soft-delete.

truck_split.help_body: These are the OFFICIAL weights written on export documents — capped at 18,100 kg per truck. Real trucks carry 20,000–21,000 kg, but documents always use these figures. When a user picks N firms on Sheet R9, each firm-split row is auto-filled with the value below for that N.

users_admin.title: Users
users_admin.name: Name
users_admin.subtitle: Manage users and permissions
users_admin.password_min: Password must be at least 8 characters
users_admin.reset_password_hint: The current password is hidden — just set a new one.

common.error: An error occurred. Please try again.

permissions_admin.subtitle: Manage block rules and permissions
permissions_admin.page_vis_desc: Control which pages each role can see in the sidebar and access via URL
permissions_admin.resource_perms_desc: Control view, create, edit, delete permissions per resource per role
permissions_admin.field_perms_desc: Control which fields each role can edit on a given resource
permissions_admin.no_field_config: This resource does not support field-level permissions

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: Overview of tomato export operations — 2025/2026 season
dashboard.alert_no_report: {{count}} reports missing — sold but no report submitted. Contact Arap.
dashboard.alert_quota_exceeded: Quota exceeded — Yigit H.J: Period 3 = -2,603,000 kg. Correction needed.
dashboard.alert_doc_deadline: Document deadline — {{count}} shipments need documents ready by 13:00.
dashboard.alert_weekly_plan: Weekly plan — Week {{week}}: planned {{tons}} tons, {{blocks}} blocks.

sheet.title: Shipment Sheet

harvest_date.no_blocks: No blocks attached — pick a shipment-level date below.
harvest_date.shipment_fallback: Shipment-level date (used when blocks have no date)

sheet.create_success: Shipment created — fill in the details

settings.label: Settings
settings.freeze_rows_hint: All rows up to and including the chosen row stay visible while scrolling vertically.
settings.freeze_cols_hint: Columns 1–3 are the row labels (#, Who, Field name). Columns 4+ are shipments.

sheet.unknown_row_id_error: Row order error — please refresh the page

draft.banner_body: Green — today (highest export priority), Yellow — yesterday (urgent), Red — 2+ days (local only).
draft.empty: No drafts — click '+ New Draft' to create one
draft.card_sort_note: No variety — weight master will record at packaging
draft.composer_info: Add 1–11 blocks. Even the smallest leftover should not go to waste.
draft.composer_notes_ph: E.g.: large leftover of one variety, or ~1.6 calibration
draft.composer_sort_notice_body: No variety in draft. The weight master will record the variety per pallet at packaging.
draft.composer_error_no_rows: Fill at least one block row

assign.page_subtitle: Left: supply (sorted by freshness) · Right: demand
assign.banner_body: Drafts have no variety yet. Gadam decides based on typical block plantings.
assign.match_empty_primary: Select a shipment from the left
assign.match_empty_secondary: Then select a demand from the right
assign.compat_any_variety: Demand accepts any variety — all shipments qualify.
assign.compat_strict_body: Requires confirmation after packaging — or choose a different shipment.
assign.compat_soft: Shipment blocks: {{blocks}}. Variety is not critical — packaging will confirm.
assign.compat_old_body: not suitable for export. Local market or Gapy Satys only.
assign.compat_yesterday_body: must ship urgently, do not postpone.
assign.confirm_navigate_body: Draft has been moved to the lifecycle. Open the shipment page?
assign.variety_pending_warning_body: Variety is confirmed at packaging — wait or pick another truck. Strict-variety customers need confirmation.

official_code.title: Shipment Code
official_code.info_banner: Dual code system: 6-field Shipment Code (on pallets + documents) and the auto Export Code (platform tracker). The Shipment Code identifies the physical batch — stays the same across re-routings.

pallet.banner_source_of_truth: Sent-weight source of truth: this manifest. Received weight at customer is in another system.

freshness.aged_redirect_hint: 2+ days — redirect to domestic / Gapy Satyş

instructions.title: How to write a good report
instructions.intro: The more detail you provide, the faster we can help.
instructions.screenshot_windows: Press Win+Shift+S to select an area. Paste with Ctrl+V below.
instructions.screenshot_mac: Press Cmd+Shift+4 and select an area. The file is saved to your desktop.
instructions.paste_hint: You can paste a screenshot directly into the field below using Ctrl+V.

fab.tooltip: Send feedback or report a bug

detail.no_active_task: No task assigned to you on this shipment
detail.promote_confirm_body: This moves the shipment from Draft into Loading. Loading-stage tasks will be generated; the warehouse team is notified.
detail.promote_toast_error: Promote failed — check that destination and customer are set
detail.others_working: {{count}} task with other roles. You'll be notified when it's your turn.
detail.others_working_plural: {{count}} tasks with other roles. You'll be notified when it's your turn.
detail.unblock_role_required: Only the {{role}} or a supervisor can unblock this task.

tasks.no_target_fields: No fields to fill — mark done when ready
